# MLHandActionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataSource(_:)

**Case**

Creates a validation dataset from a data source.

## Declaration

```swift
case dataSource(MLHandActionClassifier.DataSource)
```

## Discussion

- dataSource: An [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLHandActionClassifier/DataSource] instance.

## Designating validation data

- **MLHandActionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)**: Creates a validation dataset by randomly selecting a portion of the hand action classifier task’s training dataset with a split strategy.
- **MLHandActionClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none**: Creates an empty validation dataset, which tells the task to skip the model validation phase in a training session.
